recording_id.description: Unique identifier for the specific audio recording.

recording_input_gain.description: Input gain level applied to the recording device, if available.

recording_microphone.description: Name or description of the microphone used to capture the audio.

Prompts.description: List of prompts or stimuli presented during the recording task.

audio_channel_count.description: Number of audio channels in the recording.

audio_sample_rate.description: Sampling rate of the audio recording in Hz.
